name: elegy-skills
description: Governed skill definition for Elegy's current dedicated skills surface: thin MCP-to-skill generation over governed descriptor inputs.

metadata.summary: Dedicated MCP-to-skill generation from governed descriptors without claiming autonomous authoring or host registration that does not exist yet.

triggers.description: When work involves the current dedicated MCP-to-skill generation surface.
When governed skill artifacts need to be generated from an MCP descriptor.
When a bounded MCP slice should be projected into governed skill definitions.
When the dedicated skill-generation CLI surface should be used instead of broader automation claims.

constraints.description: This surface generates skill artifacts from governed MCP descriptor inputs only.
Do not claim autonomous authoring, host registration, or runtime-side skill execution through this CLI unless those paths are explicitly implemented elsewhere.

parameters.name: descriptor
parameters.description: Path to a governed MCP descriptor used as the generation source.

parameters.name: outputDir
parameters.description: Optional output directory for generated governed skill-definition artifacts.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Allow overwriting generated skill files when an output directory is provided.

output.description: Command-scoped skill-generation reports including generated skill definitions, skipped tools, and written output files.
